_comment: Demo payload only. Use this to test the Inbound Lead Webhook node in n8n. No real credentials or PII.
pain_point: Sales team wastes time researching every inbound lead

qualification.qualification_reason: Director-level buyer at a SaaS company with clear budget, near-term timeline, and a pain point that maps directly to the product.
qualification.recommended_next_action: Assign to AE for discovery call within 24 hours

draft_follow_up_email.subject: Quick follow-up from ScaleOps AI inquiry
draft_follow_up_email.body:
Hi Jessica,

Thanks for reaching out. Based on what you shared about your team spending too much time on inbound lead research, I think there's a strong fit here.

Would you have 20 minutes this week or next to walk through how we've helped similar SaaS revenue teams cut that research time significantly?

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
[Sales Rep Name]
